site.name: TAMKEEN
site.footerDesc: TAMKEEN is a premier engineering solutions provider, specializing in power distribution, marine automation, and industrial infrastructure. We deliver reliability where it matters most—from the depths of the ocean to the heart of the power grid.

hero.headline: Engineering the Future of Global Energy.
hero.subheadline: From high-voltage power management to offshore automation, TAMKEEN delivers turnkey industrial solutions with uncompromised safety and precision.

heroSlides.headline: Engineering the Future of Global Energy
heroSlides.subheadline: Turnkey power solutions from 10MW to 500MW — delivering reliability that powers entire nations.

heroSlides.headline: Harnessing the Sun. Powering the World.
heroSlides.subheadline: Utility-scale solar farms and advanced BESS deployments that redefine sustainable infrastructure.

heroSlides.headline: Where Innovation Meets the Horizon.
heroSlides.subheadline: Advanced wind energy systems and grid integration services for a cleaner tomorrow.

heroSlides.headline: Precision Engineering. Zero Compromise.
heroSlides.subheadline: PLC/SCADA integration, industrial electrical infrastructure, and factory-floor power optimization.

heroSlides.headline: Built for the High Seas. Trusted Worldwide.
heroSlides.subheadline: Dynamic positioning, ruggedized power systems, and offshore automation for the harshest environments.

services.title: Power Generation & Distribution
services.description: Supply of high-grade turbines, switchgears, and load management systems for thermal and renewable plants. We ensure seamless synchronization with national grids.

services.title: Marine & Offshore Automation
services.description: Advanced navigation controls, dynamic positioning systems, and ruggedized power distribution for commercial fleets and offshore drilling rigs.

services.title: Industrial Electrical Infrastructure
services.description: End-to-end automation, PLC/SCADA integration, and factory power optimization for heavy industries including steel, cement, and mining.

services.title: EV Ecosystem & Solar Integration
services.description: High-capacity DC fast chargers, utility-scale solar farm installations, and advanced battery energy storage systems (BESS) for peak load shifting.

services.title: Oil & Gas Equipment
services.description: Strategic sourcing and supply of upstream/downstream drilling components, high-pressure valves, and complete refinery process equipment packages.

services.title: Turbine Lifecycle Services
services.description: Comprehensive maintenance, performance tuning, rotor overhauls, and rapid spare parts supply for both gas and steam turbines.

about.title: More than a supplier. We are your operational backbone.
about.description: TAMKEEN bridges the gap between complex engineering blueprints and on-ground execution. Our ethos is built on reliability—ensuring that every megawatt and every marine vessel operates at peak efficiency, safely, and without interruption. We combine a global sourcing network with deep local technical expertise to solve the toughest energy challenges.

process.title: Consultation & Assessment
process.description: We begin by deeply understanding your operational requirements, site conditions, and project goals through expert technical consultation.

process.title: Engineering & Design
process.description: Our engineers develop precise technical specifications, schematics, and procurement plans aligned with international standards.

process.title: Execution & Deployment
process.description: From procurement to installation, our certified teams execute every phase with precision, safety, and strict timeline adherence.

process.title: Commissioning & Support
process.description: We hand over fully tested, commissioned systems backed by our 24/7 technical support and rapid-response maintenance contracts.

projects.title: 50MW Solar Farm Grid Integration
projects.description: Complete turnkey installation of solar arrays, central inverters, and grid-sync protection systems commissioned within 6 months.

projects.title: Offshore Platform PLC Retrofit
projects.description: Replaced obsolete legacy control systems with SIL-rated safety PLCs, reducing unplanned downtime by 40%.

projects.title: EV Charging Corridor Deployment
projects.description: Deployed 24 ultra-fast 240kW DC charging stations across 500 km, integrated with a centralized remote monitoring system.

team.name: Rajiv Sharma
team.bio: 20+ years leading large-scale energy infrastructure projects across Asia and the Middle East. Former senior engineer at BHEL.

team.name: Arjun Mehta
team.bio: Expert in power systems engineering, PLC/SCADA integration, and renewable energy grid synchronization.

team.name: Priya Nair
team.bio: Specialist in global supply chain management and logistics for heavy industrial equipment across 12 countries.

team.name: Ananya Singh
team.bio: Certified offshore automation specialist with hands-on experience in dynamic positioning and marine power management systems.

whyChoose.title: Uncompromising Safety
whyChoose.description: We strictly adhere to ISO, OSHA, and API standards. Safety is never a secondary priority.

whyChoose.title: Global Sourcing Network
whyChoose.description: Direct OEM relationships and strategic global logistics ensure premium parts reach you faster.

whyChoose.title: 24/7 Technical Support
whyChoose.description: Round-the-clock engineering hotline with rapid dispatch teams to minimize your operational downtime.

whyChoose.title: End-to-End Execution
whyChoose.description: We handle everything from conceptual design, procurement, installation, to final commissioning.

testimonials.name: Capt. R. Singh
testimonials.text: TAMKEEN's automation overhaul cut our fleet's fuel consumption by 12% in the first quarter. Their offshore team's technical acumen is unmatched.

testimonials.name: A. Mehta
testimonials.text: We rely on them for critical turbine spares. Their delivery is consistently ahead of schedule, and the quality is always OEM-grade.

testimonials.name: S. Kumar
testimonials.text: The 50MW solar integration was executed flawlessly. TAMKEEN's team brought both the technical depth and project discipline we needed.

faqs.q: What is your typical lead time for turbine parts?
faqs.a: For standard OEM parts, lead time is 4-6 weeks. For critical/custom orders, we expedite within 2-3 weeks using our express global sourcing channels.

faqs.q: Do you provide on-site installation and commissioning support?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We provide full O&M (Operations & Maintenance) support, including on-site commissioning, engineer training, and remote diagnostic assistance.

faqs.q: Which international quality standards do you comply with?
faqs.a: We strictly comply with ISO 9001:2015 (Quality), ISO 14001 (Environment), and API standards for all supplied equipment and services.

faqs.q: Can TAMKEEN handle both procurement and installation?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer full turnkey services — from engineering design and global procurement to on-site installation, testing, and commissioning.
Absolutely. We currently serve clients across 12 countries spanning South Asia, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, with a robust global logistics network.

productCategories.title: Turbines & Generators
productCategories.description: High-grade gas, steam, and hydro turbines up to 500MW capacity, complete with synchronizing switchgear and protection systems.

productCategories.title: Switchgear & Panel Boards
productCategories.description: MV/HV switchgear panels, motor control centers, and VFD drive panels for industrial and utility-scale applications.

productCategories.title: Marine Automation Systems
productCategories.description: Ruggedized navigation displays, DP systems, and power management solutions for commercial vessels and offshore rigs.

productCategories.title: Solar PV Modules & Inverters
productCategories.description: Utility-scale solar PV modules, central and string inverters, and complete BESS solutions for commercial and industrial deployments.

productCategories.title: EV Charging Stations
productCategories.description: DC fast chargers from 50kW to 240kW, bi-directional V2G chargers, and complete charging corridor deployment services.

productCategories.title: Industrial Valves & Fittings
productCategories.description: API 6A wellhead equipment, high-pressure gate and ball valves, and complete pipeline inspection tooling for oil and gas operations.

productCategories.title: PLC & SCADA Systems
productCategories.description: End-to-end industrial automation solutions including PLC programming, SCADA integration, and hazardous area electrical installations.

productCategories.title: Turbine Spare Parts
productCategories.description: OEM-equivalent turbine spares including combustion liners, rotor blades, bearings, and control system components with rapid 2-week express sourcing.
